columns.name: TIDSPUNKT
columns.description: Time stamp of the event or transaction

columns.description: Start time of the registration or event

columns.name: TIDSPUNKT_UT
columns.description: End time of the registration or event

columns.name: KALK_TIMER
columns.description: Calculated hours for the time registration

columns.description: Flag indicating if the task is completed

columns.description: Factor to divide the time registration by

columns.name: ETTERREG
